title: Rich Smoky Portuguese Liver Stew
description: A hearty, smoky stew of chicken liver simmered in a traditional ttukbaegi earthenware pot, perfect for a post-workout meal without onion or garlic.
instructions: Rinse chicken liver under cold water and pat dry.
Heat ttukbaegi over medium heat, add olive oil and swirl to coat bottom.
Add liver, sear until browned on all sides, about 3-4 minutes.
Sprinkle smoked paprika, salt, pepper over livers, stir to combine.
Pour in water and chicken broth, bring to a gentle simmer.
Cover and let stew cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally until liver is tender.
Remove lid, reduce remaining liquid by half if desired, creating a thicker sauce.
Garnish with fresh parsley, serve hot.
